introSection:
Batman The Ride is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

The ride replaced the former Motorama Turnpike attraction.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Batman The Ride was announced on August 28, 2014. The ride was installed by Northwest Coasters.

The highest point of the ride was topped off in March 2015.

Batman The Ride officially opened on May 23, 2015.

The ride was refurbished for its 10th anniversary with a repaint and a refreshed Batman logo.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features two beyond-vertical drops, at least six inversions and a "12-story" vertical lift hill.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content:
Two riders sit at either side of the track.

S&S showed off a vehicle from Batman The Ride at the 2014 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

The ride replaced the former Motorama Turnpike attraction.

The addition of Batman The Ride was announced on August 28, 2014. The ride was installed by Northwest Coasters.

The highest point of the ride was topped off in March 2015.

Batman The Ride officially opened on May 23, 2015.

The ride was refurbished for its 10th anniversary with a repaint and a refreshed Batman logo.

The ride features two beyond-vertical drops, at least six inversions and a "12-story" vertical lift hill.

Two riders sit at either side of the track.

S&S showed off a vehicle from Batman The Ride at the 2014 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.
